title: Transformers: Zone
synopsis: The final animated entry in the Japanese Generation 1 continuity, Transformers: Zone is a single OVA episode in which the Decepticon entity Violen Jiger -- a composite being of fallen Decepticon spirits -- assembles the Nine Great Demon Generals to seize the powerful Zodiac energy source. After Victory Saber goes missing during the destruction of planet Feminia, the Powered Master Dai Atlas rises to become the new Autobot Supreme Commander, teaming with Sonic Bomber and the Micromasters to defeat the Decepticon menace and secure the Zodiac.

episodes.title: Enter the New Supreme Commander, Dai Atlas!
episodes.synopsis: The fearsome Violen Jiger assembles the Nine Great Demon Generals -- Devastator, Menasor, Bruticus, Trypticon, Predaking, Abominus, King Poseidon, Overlord, and BlackZarak -- to seize the Zodiac energy source. After Victory Saber disappears during the destruction of planet Feminia, the Powered Master Dai Atlas recovers him and fights the Decepticon generals on Earth. Using the Zodiac's power, Dai Atlas and Sonic Bomber transform into Zone Modes and defeat the invaders, after which Victory Saber appoints Dai Atlas as the new Autobot Supreme Commander.

characters.name: Violen Jiger
characters.alt_mode: Three insectoid forms: Vion (stag beetle), Lenger (mole cricket), Iguarn (mantis)

facts: Transformers: Zone was originally planned as a full television series, but declining toy sales and franchise popularity led to it being truncated to a single direct-to-video OVA special.
The OVA was directed by Hiromichi Matano, written by Toyohiro Ando, and produced by Takara and Nihon Columbia with animation by Toei Animation.
Zone represents the final traditionally animated entry in the Japanese Generation 1 Transformers continuity, marking the end of an era that began with The Headmasters in 1987.

The Nine Great Demon Generals consist entirely of previously established Decepticon combiners and large characters: Devastator, Menasor, Bruticus, Trypticon, Predaking, Abominus, King Poseidon, Overlord, and BlackZarak.

Dai Atlas, Sonic Bomber, and Roadfire can combine to form Big Powered, and using the Zodiac artifact, this combination can be enhanced to thirty times its normal strength with the Rainbow Powered Attack.
